steps: Contact BNP Paribas Securities to report the EUR 3,744.00 overpayment on TotalEnergies SE dividend due to under-withholding (13.5% vs. treaty rate 15.0%)
Request custodian initiate corrective withholding or facilitate direct remittance to French tax authorities for the shortfall amount
Submit Form 5001 to French tax administration if required to regularize the withholding tax position for this dividend payment
Document the corrective action with both custodian and Norwegian tax authorities to ensure proper treaty compliance reporting

references.title: impots.gouv.fr – Form 5001 (Reimbursement of WHT on Dividends)
